title: Arihant Publications South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Arihant Publications South Asia Partners is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Arihant Publications South Asia Partners family as a Subject Matter Expert in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Arihant Publications South Asia Partners:
Arihant Publications South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications South Asia Partners!
